description: Slot structure sweep: compares all four TDMA configurations.
notes: Config A (0): Cold-start — full acquisition each slot.
Config B (1): Multi-packet burst — 3 pkts/slot, single acquisition.
Config C (2): Tracking mode — T_acq=0 for consecutive slots.
Config D (3): Bitmap ACK — 13-byte aggregate ACK in egress.
Expected: Config C has highest gamma, Config A has lowest.
